name: sloth-d2c
description: Codex skills for running the Sloth D2C design-to-code workflow through Sloth-side persistent sessions, snapshots, and incremental annotation events.

interface.shortDescription: Run Sloth D2C with persistent Sloth session events.
interface.longDescription: Sloth D2C gives Codex skill workflows for using the existing Sloth interceptor page, waiting for first-run design submission before generating code, reading versioned Sloth session snapshots, handling only actionable pending human events, processing chunks, and writing agent results back to the session without registering MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Open the existing Sloth D2C interceptor page for this project.
On first run, wait for workflow.submitted before generating code or writing implementationUrl.
In loop mode, read generated-preview annotation events and process only the pending ones.
